title: Norwegian Potato Casserole
description: A hearty, savory casserole originating from Norway, perfect for a cold evening. This dish is a comforting blend of potatoes, cheese, and herbs.
instructions: Peel the potatoes and slice them thinly.
In a large pan, caramelize the onions over medium heat.
In a separate bowl, mix together the cheese blend, rosemary, salt, and pepper.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, arrange a layer of potatoes.
Top the potatoes with a layer of caramelized onions, followed by a layer of cheese mixture.
Repeat this process until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Dot the top of the casserole with butter.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
